stages.concept:
# Unit 116: 능동태와 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **능동태와 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> Tom **broke** the window. (능동태)
> 톰이 창문을 깨뜨렸다.

> The window **was broken** by Tom. (수동태)
> 창문이 톰에 의해 깨졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **능동태** — 주어가 행동을 하는 문장
**수동태** — 주어가 행동을 받는 문장

👩‍🏫 선생님: 수동태 형태: **be동사 + 과거분사(p.p.) + by 행위자**

> English **is spoken** by many people.
> 영어는 많은 사람들에 의해 사용된다.

> The cake **was made** by my mom.
> 그 케이크는 엄마에 의해 만들어졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 능동태 → 수동태 전환:
1. 능동태의 **목적어** → 수동태의 **주어**
2. 동사를 **be + p.p.**로 변환
3. 능동태의 **주어** → **by + 목적격**

> She **writes** a letter. → A letter **is written** by her.

**Q. 다음 능동태 문장을 수동태로 바르게 전환한 것을 고르세요.**
"He fixed the computer."
1. The computer is fixed by him.
2. The computer was fixed by him. ✅
3. The computer was fixed to him.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 능동태 동사가 과거형(fixed)이었으므로 수동태에서도 be동사의 과거형(was)을 써야 해요. 또한 행위자는 by 뒤에 목적격(him)을 쓴답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 수동태는 be + p.p. + by! 능동태의 주어/동사/목적어 자리가 어떻게 바뀌는지 알겠어요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 116: 능동태와 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
This tree (     ) by my father.
> **정답** was planted

---

**02.** English ? by many people.
> **정답** is spoken

---

**03.** The cake ? by my mom.
> **정답** was made

---

**04.** The window ? by the boy.
> **정답** was broken

---

**05.** This song ? by many students.
> **정답** is loved

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The book was write by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** write → written

---

**07.** The letter is send by him.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** send → sent

---

**08.** The door was open by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** open → opened

---

**09.** The picture is draw by the student.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** draw → drawn

---

**10.** The room was clean by them.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** clean → cleaned

---

**11.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꾸시오.
She wrote the letter.
> **정답** The letter was written by her.

---

**12.** He broke the window.
> **정답** The window was broken by him.

---

**13.** Many people speak English.
> **정답** English is spoken by many people.

---

**14.** My mom made the cake.
> **정답** The cake was made by my mom.

---

**15.** The teacher praised the student.
> **정답** The student was praised by the teacher.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
이 노래는 많은 사람들에게 사랑받는다.
This song loved is by many people
> **정답** This / song / is / loved / by / many / people

---

**17.** 이 책은 그녀에 의해 쓰여졌다.
This book written was by her
> **정답** This / book / was / written / by / her

---

**18.** 그 창문은 그에 의해 깨졌다.
The window broken was by him
> **정답** The / window / was / broken / by / him

---

**19.** 영어는 세계에서 사용된다.
English spoken is around the world
> **정답** English / is / spoken / around / the / world

---

**20.** 이 그림은 학생에 의해 그려졌다.
This picture drawn was by the student
> **정답** This / picture / was / drawn / by / the / student
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 116: 능동태와 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Parents love their children.
Their children loved by their parents.
Their children are loved their parents.
Their children loved their parents.
Their children are loved by their parents.
> **정답** Their children are loved by their parents.

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
I draw pictures every day.
Pictures __________ by me every day.
is drawn
was drawn
were drawn
are drawn
> **정답** are drawn

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
My father drives a bus.
A bus __________ by my father.
is driven
was driven
driven
draw
> **정답** is driven

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
He plants an apple tree in the yard.
An apple tree plants in the yard by him.
An apple tree is plant in the yard by him.
An apple tree is planted in the yard by him
An apple tree planted in the yard by him
• plant ~를 심다
> **정답** An apple tree is planted in the yard by him

---

**05.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
법은 모든 사람들에 의해 지켜진다.
The law is kept everyone.
The law keeps everyone.
The law kept everyone.
The law is kept by everyone.
> **정답** The law is kept by everyone.

---

**06.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
이 책은 온라인 서점에서 팔린다.
This book __________ at an online bookstore.
is sold
sells
sold
be sold
> **정답** is sold

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
She waters the flowers in the garden.
The flowers watered by her in the garden.
The flowers are water by her in the garden.
The flowers are watered by her in the garden.
The flowers are watered her in the garden.
• water (동) 물을 주다
> **정답** The flowers are watered by her in the garden.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom has a dog.
She is resembled her grandma.
The house is burned by the man.
This picture taken last year by me.
> **정답** This picture taken last year by me., She is resembled
her grandma.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오.
The ball kicked by children.
The tree is cutted by a woodcutter.
The room is cleaned by her.
The book is read by I.
• maid 가정부
> **정답** The room is cleaned by her.

---

**10.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The wind shakes the curtain.
The curtain is shake by the wind.
The curtain is shaken by the wind.
The curtain shakes by the wind.
The curtain are shaken by the wind.
> **정답** The curtain is shaken by the wind.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
The light turned on by her.
The window was broken by her.
The bread is smelled good.
The cat is raised by her.
• raise 기르다, 양육하다
> **정답** The light turned on by her., The bread is smelled
good.

---

**12.** 다음 중 수동태로 바꿀 수 없는 문장을 고르시오 [2개]
Rabbits eat grass.
I cut the paper.
He has three bicycles.
She is dancing on the stage.
> **정답** She is dancing on the stage., He has three bicycles.

---

**13.** 다음 중 수동태로 바꿀 수 있는 문장을 고르시오.
They belong to a tennis club.
My grandmother has a beautiful garden.
He writes a letter.
The bed is comfortable.
> **정답** He writes a letter.

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
단어를 쓰시오.
Tom wraps the gift for her.
The gift for her __________ by Tom.
are wrapped
is wrapped
was wrapped
wraps
> **정답** is wrapped

---

**15.** 다음 중 수동태로 바꿀 수 있는 문장을 고르시오.
The story remained a mystery.
What happened?
I make a box.
They have many books.
> **정답** I make a box.

---

**16.** 다음 글에서 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
There are many plants and animals in the garden.
Plants are grown by my mother. Rabbits
fed by me. The grass
is trimmed by the father. The garden
is making by my family.
• trim 다듬다, 손질하다
> **정답** are grown, are fed, is trimmed, is made

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The problem was disappeared
within a few weeks.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** was disappeared → disappeared

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The diamond ring be stolen by
the thief last night.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** be → was

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The roof of the house is
painted by we.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** we. → us

---

**20.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
이 쿠키들은 유명한 제빵사에 의해 만들어졌다.
These cookies __________ a famous baker.
was made
made
were made by
are made
> **정답** were made by
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 116 능동태와 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
Many people build that building.
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  many people.
정답 That, building, is, built, by

---

**02.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
The public posts the story online.
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the
public.
정답 The, story, is, posted, online, by

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 코트들은 해외 판매자에 의해 배송된다. [deliver]
The coats  (     )   (     )   (     )  overseas sellers.
정답 are, delivered, by

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 강아지는 우리 가족이 키운다. [raise, our family]
The puppy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
• raise 양육하다, 키우다
정답 is, raised, by, our, family

---

**05.** 다음 글을 읽고 주어진 단어를 이용하여 글을 완성하시오.
A small spring [make] (     )  by rainwater in
the forest. This spring [drink] (     )  by many
animals. They can drink water and live there. No
animal fights here. This place [love]
by them.
• spring 샘, 연못
정답 is made (was made), is drunk, is loved

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
A: Who makes this question?
B: It's Tom. This question  (     )   (     )  by
. [make]
정답 is, made, him (Tom)

---

**07.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
A cat catches a mouse.
A mouse  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 is, caught, by, a, cat

---

**08.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
She fixed the car yesterday.
The car  (     )   (     )  yesterday  (     )   (     ) .
정답 was, fixed, by, her

---

**09.** 수동태를 능동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
The ball is kicked by him.
He  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 kicks, the, ball

---

**10.** 수동태를 능동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
The car is driven by her.
She  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 drives, the, car

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 116: 능동태와 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Teachers guide their students.
Their students guided by their teachers.
Their students are guided their teachers.
Their students guided their teachers.
Their students are guided by their teachers.
> 정답: Their students are guided by their teachers.

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I write poems every week.
Poems __________ by me every week. is written was written were written are written
> 정답: are written

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My mother drives a car.
A car __________ by my mother. is driven was driven driven draw
> 정답: is driven

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
She plants a rose in the garden.
A rose plants in the garden by her.
A rose is plant in the garden by her.
A rose is planted in the garden by her.
A rose planted in the garden by her.
> 정답: A rose is planted in the garden by her.

---

**05.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
규칙은 모든 학생들에 의해 지켜진다.
The rules is kept all students.
The rules keeps all students.
The rules kept all students.
The rules are kept by all students.
> 정답: The rules are kept by all students.

---

**06.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
이 빵은 그 빵집에서 팔린다.
This bread __________ at the bakery. is sold sells sold be sold
> 정답: is sold

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
He cleans the windows in the office.
The windows cleaned by him in the office.
The windows are clean by him in the office.
The windows are cleaned by him in the office.
The windows are cleaned him in the office.
> 정답: The windows are cleaned by him in the office.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom has a pet.
She is resembled her aunt.
The house is damaged by the storm.
This photo taken last summer by me.
> 정답: This photo taken last summer by me., She is resembled

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오.
The ball kicked by the players.
The tree is cutted by a worker.
The floor is cleaned by her.
The book is read by I.
> 정답: The floor is cleaned by her.

---

**10.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The wind moves the leaves.
The leaves is move by the wind.
The leaves are moved by the wind.
The leaves moves by the wind.
The leaves was moved by the wind.
> 정답: The leaves are moved by the wind.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
The lamp turned on by him.
The window was opened by her.
The soup is smelled good.
The dog is trained by him.
> 정답: The lamp turned on by him., The soup is smelled

---

**12.** 다음 중 수동태로 바꿀 수 없는 문장을 고르시오 [2개] Dogs eat bones. I fold the paper. He has two computers. She is running on the track.
> 정답: She is running on the track., He has two computers.

---

**13.** 다음 중 수동태로 바꿀 수 있는 문장을 고르시오.
They belong to a book club.
My grandfather has a lovely garden.
She writes a journal.
The sofa is soft.
> 정답: She writes a journal.

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
Amy wraps the present for him.
The present for him __________ by Amy. are wrapped is wrapped was wrapped wraps
> 정답: is wrapped

---

**15.** 다음 중 수동태로 바꿀 수 있는 문장을 고르시오.
The secret remained hidden.
What occurred?
I build a shelf.
They have many toys.
> 정답: I build a shelf.

---

**16.** 다음 글에서 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
There are many flowers and insects in the garden.
Flowers are grown by my father.
Butterflies attracted by the flowers.
The lawn is trimmed by my brother.
The garden is maintaining by my family.
> 정답: are grown, are attracted, is trimmed, is maintained

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  issue  was  disappeared within  a  few  days. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: was disappeared → disappeared

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  gold  ring  be  stolen  by the  thief  last  week. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: be → was

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  wall  of  the  house  is painted  by  we. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: we. → us

---

**20.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
이 케이크들은 유명한 제빵사에 의해 만들어졌다.
These cakes __________ a famous baker. was made made were made by are made
> 정답: were made by
